content:
Your resume is well-organized and presents your background in a clear and professional manner. The skills section is strong, but your work experience section could be improved by adding more quantifiable achievements—specific numbers or results will help demonstrate the impact of your work. Additionally, check for consistent formatting in spacing and punctuation.

With a few small refinements, your materials will be even stronger. Keep up the great work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

Grades:
• Cover Letter: 80/100
• Resume: 85/100

⸻

Letter for Karima Karobi

Dear Karima,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. You’ve put together strong materials, and I can see that you’ve thought carefully about how to present your skills and experience. Below is my feedback.

Your cover letter is well-structured and professionally written. You clearly articulate your skills and enthusiasm for the role. However, one area that could use improvement is customization—while you highlight your skills well, adding a few specific details about why you are drawn to this company or role would make your letter even more compelling. Additionally, your closing paragraph could be slightly stronger by reinforcing what you bring to the company rather than simply thanking them.
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 12 (chunk 12/22)
